scripts.dev: concurrently -k "corepack pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @timetracker/web dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort --mode desktop" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && TIMETRACKER_DESKTOP_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron ."
scripts.start: node scripts/run-renderer.cjs build && node scripts/run-renderer.cjs start
